_comment: v11-beta.1 hourly aggregation with WBGT mean target. For calibration MAE comparison. Prereq: run v11_beta_aggregate_hourly.py first. [v2.1 update: added M7_compact_weather_ridge]

model._proxy_note: wbgt_proxy_v09_c is the v0.9 production proxy (Stull wet-bulb + globe-T with wind-attenuated radiation). This is the project's canonical lineage proxy used in v07/v08/v09 forecast pipelines. Expected M0 bias around -1.1 to -1.3 deg C based on v0.9-beta findings.

data_filters._comment: Set exclude_station_ids to ['S142'] for the no-S142 sensitivity case. Use output_dir_suffix to write to a sub-folder so all_stations and no_S142 runs do not overwrite each other.

_methodology_notes: Ladder structure mirrors v0.9-beta (M0/M1/M1b/M2/M3/M4/M5/M6) on v11 archive.
M1b PeriodBiasModel is included; v0.9-beta findings showed M1b is the most useful single-correction baseline (24h archive: M1 MAE=1.32, M1b MAE=0.66).
M4 inertia features now include true time-aware lags (shortwave_lag_1h/2h, cumulative_day_shortwave, dTair_dt_1h, proxy_lag_1h/3h_mean), addressing the friend's 5.1 audit item.
M5/M6 morphology unidentifiability (only S128 has v10 cell features) remains structural; expect SimpleImputer to drop most morph cols in LOSO folds excluding S128.
For the S142 sensitivity case: copy this config, set exclude_station_ids=['S142'], output_dir_suffix='no_S142', run v11_beta_calibration_baselines.py separately.
Threshold scan WBGT>=33 remains exploratory only until archive >= 30 days.
